description:
Split-out from fz-ul4.11.4. Remaining AST -> fz-IR lowering after fz-ul4.11.16 (core) lands.

## In scope

- Expr: Case (pattern dispatch -> if-cascade with bind), Cond ((cond,body) chain -> if-cascade), With (pattern <- expr / Bare(expr) chain -> cascading conditionals; failure cases -> else_clauses dispatch).
- Expr: Map (Prim::MakeMap entries), MapUpdate (Prim::MapUpdate base + entries), Index (Prim::MapGet — bracket access returning nil if absent).
- Expr: Bitstring expressions (Prim::MakeBitstring with field specs preserved).
- Expr: VecLit for all VecKind (Numeric/Bytes/Bits) -> Prim::MakeVec(kind, elems).
- Patterns: Map (key extractions + recursive), Bitstring (bit-extraction prims, mirroring eval.rs/bitstr.rs matcher logic).
- Prim variants added: MakeMap, MapUpdate, MapGet, MakeBitstring(Vec<BitFieldIr>), MakeVec(VecKindIr, Vec<Var>), MatchBitstring (for pattern), MatchMapKey.
- Quote/Unquote: hard error LowerError::PostExpansionNode (should have been removed by macro expansion).

## Tests

- Lower remaining fixtures end-to-end (any with maps/bitstrings/vecs/case/cond/with).
- Bitstring pattern with size/endian/signed/utf8 specs round-trips.
- With-form: success path threads results, else-clause path runs on first failure.
- Map pattern matches present keys, fails on absent.
- Vec literal of each VecKind produces correct prim.

## UNBLOCKS

- fz-ul4.11.6 (frame liveness needs full IR shape)
title: AST -> fz-IR translator (rest of variants)
